ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is a part of */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (left/right) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (left/right) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent the team faced */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "game_duration" REAL /* Duration of the game in hours */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom the performance is recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the performance occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits achieved by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_player_stats" (
  "seasonal_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom the stats are recorded */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the stats were accumulated */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits achieved by the player in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player in the season */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Total runs batted in by the player in the season */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned by the player in the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats by the player in the season */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the player in the season */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonal_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being benchmarked (e.g., batting average, ERA) */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Benchmark value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, manager, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
